case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. HEATHER C YIN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YIN, HEATHER C DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-10-2012
DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YIN, HEATHER C DOES 1 TO 25
POS; DECLARATION OF NONSERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YIN, HEATHER C
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED OCT-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YIN, HEATHER C
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YIN, HEATHER C
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YIN, HEATHER C
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
DECLARATION RE: COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1033(B)(2); WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DECLARATION RE: 1) REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT [CCP 585] 2) COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS [EVID 1550] 3) INTEREST WAIVED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YIN, HEATHER C $3,646.30 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,882.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-06-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
